title: cert-3 premise is stale: home-link regression already fixed — proceed with guard-test-only increment?
description: The stabilization seed asks to convert a raw <a href="/"> to <Link> in src/app/page.tsx. Empirically that conversion is ALREADY in the committed tree (page.tsx:12 = <Link href="/">) and eslint . already exits 0 (trunk GREEN). I scoped the only remaining scope-disciplined increment: one Playwright e2e regression-guard test (page.tsx untouched). Decision needed before the engineer runs. Also: seed says PATCH 0.5.x but package.json is 0.4.0 → PATCH is 0.4.1, not 0.5.x.

title: ADR-0006 implemented (b510ec9) — approve merge + resolve 2 pre-existing e2e failures + version target
description:
Implemented the single scoped task from the Architect handoff: added e2e/home-nav.spec.ts asserting the header brand link returns to / via client-side next/link navigation (no full reload). page.tsx untouched. Gate: eslint . exit 0, tsc --noEmit exit 0, the new spec passes (1 passed). Committed locally as b510ec9 on main; NOT pushed/merged because autonomy is review_each_pr.

TWO decisions needed:
1) The FULL e2e suite shows 2 PRE-EXISTING failures unrelated to this change — e2e/dashboard.spec.ts:12 (dashboard shell text) and e2e/wealth-score.spec.ts:49 (playbook-upside pill). These are tracked, unmodified files failing on current main HEAD; I did NOT fix them (out-of-scope constraint). They will block any 'full-suite-green' release gate and should be ticketed independently.
2) Version target: seed says 0.5.x but package.json is 0.4.0 and this is non-functional → PATCH 0.4.1 (0.5.x would be a MINOR).

title: Code Review verdict: APPROVE b510ec9 (ADR-0006 home-nav guard) — merge + ticket 2 pre-existing e2e failures
description: Code review of b510ec9 is COMPLETE with verdict APPROVE. The change adds only e2e/home-nav.spec.ts (behavioral regression guard for the header brand link's client-side navigation). Reviewer re-ran the gate independently: tsc --noEmit exit 0, eslint on the new file exit 0, build-integrity PASS (single test file, no untracked-sibling barrel trap), scope clean (page.tsx untouched). No security/correctness/critical findings; 2 Low advisory notes only. Decisions for the human merge gate (autonomy = review_each_pr): approve the merge, and decide how to handle the 2 PRE-EXISTING out-of-scope e2e failures (dashboard.spec.ts:12, wealth-score.spec.ts:49) that block a full-suite-green release.

title: Security findings triage — ai-bookkeeper @ b510ec9
description: Two open findings need a decision. The postcss High has persisted across 4 scans and requires a one-line code change (overrides pin) to resolve.
